AboutUs.p1: Our goal is to create an ecosystem with a daily global audience of over 1 billion people through social media projects, mobile applications, and various local and international services.
AboutUs.p2: We don’t rely solely on advertisers; our objective is to leverage the power of marketing and audience reach to build our own Brands.
AboutUs.p3: Become part of the Bimark Ecosystem now. Soon, we will have hundreds of brands worldwide and our own currency, allowing us to set our own rules in the market.
AboutUs.p4: If you are interested in becoming a partner, please reach out via the contact details provided on our website.
AboutUs.title: About Us

HowItWorks.goal1: Become a co-owner of major online projects such as YouTube channels, Facebook pages, TikTok, Instagram accounts, and mobile applications.
HowItWorks.goal2: Bimark is an ecosystem where every project is interconnected. Every six months you receive bonuses: by leveraging a global audience of over 100 million subscribers, we will create new brands, world-class artists, and produce films. With a multi-million audience, we achieve instant million-scale reach. Each of you will receive a bonus and a stake in these newly created projects.
HowItWorks.goal3: Receive a monthly income of 5-15% thanks to stable advertising payouts from these projects. If your specific project experiences a downturn, the minimum payout is compensated by other projects.

PrivacyPolicy.title: Privacy Policy
PrivacyPolicy.introText: Welcome to the Bimark platform. We respect your privacy and are committed to protecting your personal data. This Privacy Policy explains how we collect, use, disclose, and safeguard your information when you use our website and investment services.
PrivacyPolicy.dataText: We may collect various types of information, including personal data (name, email address, contact details), financial information (data for payment processing, transaction history for project shares and BMK tokens), as well as technical data (IP address, browser type, platform usage data).
PrivacyPolicy.useText: Collected data is used to provide and maintain our services, process your investment transactions, distribute dividends, comply with legal obligations (including KYC/AML), improve user experience, and ensure platform security.
PrivacyPolicy.cookiesText: We use cookies and similar tracking technologies to monitor activity on our platform and store certain information. You can refuse the use of cookies through your browser settings or our website's settings popup.
PrivacyPolicy.rightsText: You have the right to access, correct, delete, or restrict the processing of your personal data. If you have questions about your data or wish to exercise your rights, please contact our support team.

TermsOfService.title: Terms of Service
TermsOfService.introText: Media Asset: A social media account, channel, group, or page (YouTube, Instagram, Telegram, etc.). Fractional Ownership: The right to receive a share of the income generated by a Media Asset proportional to the purchased share. Transaction: The process of transferring rights to an asset or its share between Users.
TermsOfService.subjectText: The Platform provides the User with access to marketplace features for listing, buying/selling digital assets, and investing in fractional shares. Bimark acts solely as a technical intermediary (escrow/guarantor) and does not own the assets unless explicitly stated in the listing.
TermsOfService.registrationText: By registering, the User confirms they are at least 18 years old. The User must provide accurate information. The Platform reserves the right to request Identity Verification (KYC) for financial operations. The User is solely responsible for maintaining the confidentiality of their account credentials.
TermsOfService.rulesText: Seller's Obligations: To provide truthful asset statistics. Selling assets obtained illegally or violating social media terms of service is strictly prohibited. Buyer's Obligations: To conduct due diligence before finalizing a transaction. Circumvention: Any attempt to complete a transaction outside the Platform after meeting a counterparty on Bimark will result in a permanent ban.
TermsOfService.escrowText: The Platform charges a commission on each transaction according to current rates. Upon purchase, the Buyer’s funds are held in escrow by the Platform until the transfer of access rights is confirmed. Refunds are only possible if the Seller fails to fulfill their obligations before the transaction is closed.
TermsOfService.risksText: The User acknowledges that investing in digital assets involves a risk of capital loss. The Platform does not guarantee asset profitability. Past performance is not indicative of future results. Changes in social media algorithms or asset bans by third-party platforms are considered Force Majeure, for which the Platform bears no liability.
TermsOfService.liabilityText: The Platform is not liable for any direct or indirect damages resulting from the use or inability to use the service. The Platform's maximum liability is limited to the amount of commission received from the specific transaction in dispute.
TermsOfService.disputesText: All disputes shall be resolved through negotiations via the Platform's support system. If a resolution is not reached, disputes shall be subject to the laws of Georgia.

AmlPolicy.title: AML / KYC Policy
AmlPolicy.introText: The Bimark platform strictly adheres to international standards for Anti-Money Laundering (AML) and Counter-Terrorism Financing (CTF). Our goal is to ensure maximum security and transparency for all transactions related to the purchase of digital assets, business shares, and BMK tokens.
AmlPolicy.kycText: To prevent fraud and protect bona fide investors, we reserve the right to apply identity verification (KYC) procedures. Upon reaching certain transaction limits or identifying suspicious activity, you may be asked to provide a government-issued ID and proof of residence.
AmlPolicy.monitoringText: Bimark performs continuous monitoring of user transactions using automated risk assessment systems. Any operations that deviate from standard patterns or show signs of illicit origin of funds may be temporarily frozen pending investigation.
AmlPolicy.sanctionsText: We do not provide services to individuals or organizations on international sanctions lists (including UN, OFAC, and FATF lists). During registration and transactions, accounts are automatically screened against current databases.
AmlPolicy.reportingText: In the event of clear signs of money laundering or other illegal financial activity, Bimark is obligated to report such incidents to the relevant law enforcement agencies and financial monitoring services without prior notice to the user.

RaiseCapital.title: Raise Capital
RaiseCapital.subtitle: Tokenize your business and get funding from thousands of investors in the Bimark ecosystem.
RaiseCapital.step1Desc: Fill out the form with the key metrics of your project.
RaiseCapital.step2Desc: Our team will evaluate the asset and prepare the legal framework.
RaiseCapital.step3Desc: Your project will appear in the catalog for investors to purchase shares.
RaiseCapital.successMessage: Your application has been successfully sent! We will contact you shortly.

HowItWorks2.title: How It Works
HowItWorks2.subtitle: A simple and transparent path from registering on the Bimark platform to receiving your first dividends.
HowItWorks2.step1Desc: Create an account and top up your internal wallet using your preferred method (cryptocurrency or fiat).
HowItWorks2.step2Desc: Browse the asset catalog, choose a promising project, and purchase the desired number of shares.
HowItWorks2.step3Desc: Own shares and earn passive income. Dividends from business operations are automatically credited to your balance.
HowItWorks2.step4Desc: Submit a withdrawal request in your personal account. Our managers will process it promptly and send the funds to your details.
HowItWorks2.ctaDesc: Ready to start? Explore available projects right now.

CheckoutConsent.iAgreeTo: I confirm that I have read and agree to the terms of the
CheckoutConsent.docTitle: REVENUE SHARE RIGHTS & INVESTMENT PARTICIPATION AGREEMENT
CheckoutConsent.section1Title: 1. SUBJECT AND STATUS OF THE TRANSACTION
CheckoutConsent.clause1_1: 1.1. This Agreement governs the sale and transfer of Proprietary Rights to Revenue Sharing (hereinafter — "Profit Share") generated by the operation of digital media assets under the management of the Bimark.org Platform.
CheckoutConsent.clause1_2: 1.2. The Parties acknowledge that the object of this transaction is a financial instrument (the right to claim a portion of net income) and not the legal ownership of hardware, domain names, or social media accounts.
CheckoutConsent.clause1_3: 1.3. Operational management, content strategy, and technical development of the Projects remain the sole responsibility of the Platform and its specialists.
CheckoutConsent.clause2_1: 2.1. The Platform establishes a target monthly yield corridor ranging from 5% (five percent) to 15% (fifteen percent) of the Investor's initial principal investment.
CheckoutConsent.clause2_2: 2.2. Guaranteed Minimum: The Platform undertakes an unconditional obligation to pay a minimum of 5% per month, regardless of the actual operational performance of the specific Project.
CheckoutConsent.clause2_3: 2.3. Cross-Subsidization Mechanism: Should a Project fail to reach the 5% threshold, the deficit shall be covered by the Platform's consolidated Reserve Fund and the aggregate yield of the Bimark Asset Network.
CheckoutConsent.clause2_4: 2.4. Yield Ceiling: The maximum monthly payout for standard participation is capped at 15%. Any surplus profit exceeding this threshold shall be directed to the Reserve Fund for future stability.
CheckoutConsent.clause3_1: 3.1. Startup Equity Program: The Investor shall receive monthly non-reimbursable profit-sharing rights in third-party startups and ventures promoted through the Bimark Asset Network. Allocations are proportional to the Investor’s portfolio weight.
CheckoutConsent.clause3_2: 3.2. Quarterly Loyalty Bonus: Every 90 (ninety) days of continuous ownership, a loyalty bonus is credited based on the overall capitalization growth of the Bimark ecosystem.
CheckoutConsent.clause4_1: 4.1. The Platform guarantees full technical, legal, and analytical support for the acquired Profit Share for a period of 24 (twenty-four) months.
CheckoutConsent.clause4_2: 4.2. Support includes: 24/7 security monitoring, yield auditing, and performance reporting.
CheckoutConsent.clause5_1: 5.1. The billing period is 1 (one) calendar month. Accruals are made no later than the 5th day of the month following the reporting period.
CheckoutConsent.clause5_2: 5.2. The Investor may manage the accrued profit (withdrawal or reinvestment) according to Platform limits.
CheckoutConsent.section6Title: 6. LIMITATION OF LIABILITY AND FORCE MAJEURE
CheckoutConsent.clause6_1: 6.1. The Platform shall not be liable for damages arising from changes in the global policies or technical algorithms of third-party social media providers (YouTube, Meta, X, Telegram).
CheckoutConsent.clause6_2: 6.2. Global internet outages, state-level bans of social platforms, or large-scale military conflicts affecting infrastructure shall be considered Force Majeure.
CheckoutConsent.clause6_3: 6.3. Under Force Majeure circumstances, the Platform reserves the right to temporarily suspend payouts or restructure the yield corridor until market stabilization.
CheckoutConsent.clause7_1: 7.1. All disputes shall be subject to mandatory pre-trial mediation via the Platform's Arbitration Department.
CheckoutConsent.clause7_2: 7.2. The governing law is the legislation of Georgia.

Hero.titlePart1: Invest in the new oil of the 21st century —
Hero.subtitle: Become a co-owner of the largest YouTube channels, IT projects, and media empires with yields from 5% to 15% per month.

Shift.title: Why is the world changing, but your portfolio isn't?
Shift.problem: Traditional markets are oversaturated, and bank deposits barely cover inflation. Meanwhile, media assets are growing in value every year.
Shift.solutionText: We are building an ecosystem with a reach of over 1 billion people, and today we are opening access to it for you.
Shift.visionTitle: Bimark is more than just investments
Shift.visionText: It's your stake in the future. We don't just resell assets. We leverage the power of marketing and a multi-million audience to build our own brands, launch global artists, and produce movies.

Benefits.title: What you get as an investor
Benefits.card1Text: Monthly payouts of 5–15% from the advertising revenue of active projects.
Benefits.card2Text: Thanks to the cross-subsidization mechanism and the Reserve Fund, you are protected from the downturns of specific projects.
Benefits.card3Text: By owning a share, you receive free shares in new startups that we integrate into the ecosystem every month.
Benefits.card4Text: Access to exclusive pools, voting rights, and even higher yields through our native token.

Security.title: Institutional-grade security
Security.subtitle: We understand the risks, so we protect your interests legally and technically.
Security.tab1Text: We take over the management, moderation, and development of projects. You only receive profits.
Security.tab2Text: The platform acts as a guarantor (escrow). Funds are deposited until the transfer of rights is confirmed.
Security.tab3Text: Operations under Georgian law, mandatory KYC/AML verification, and a clear property rights purchase agreement.

Steps.title: Three steps to your first profit
Steps.step1Text: Create an account and top up your wallet using any convenient method (crypto or fiat).
Steps.step2Text: Explore our catalog — from Telegram channels to turnkey IT businesses.
Steps.step3Text: Accruals are made automatically by the 5th of each month. Withdraw your profit or reinvest in new shares.

Final.partnerText: Invite friends and get a percentage of every investment they make instantly to your balance. Help us build the ecosystem and receive bonuses in BMK tokens and fiat.
Final.title: Ready to dictate your own rules?
Final.subtitle: Soon Bimark will have hundreds of brands worldwide and its own currency. Those who enter now become the foundation of this empire.
Final.slogan: Bimark. Your share in every click.
